intel.title: Massive Trend: Poképia Release (Major Event)
intel.summary: The global launch of Poképia has caused a massive 1200% spike in general Pokémon search volume. This is a rare, macro-level cultural event that you need to ride immediately.
actionItems: Pivot the next Kirbai release to themes heavily rooted in Poképia avatars or social mechanics.
Use high-volume generic Pokémon tags vs niche competitive VGC tags to capture the casual audience wave.

intel.title: AIGuerrilla: The AI Opportunity Everyone Over 35 Is Missing Right Now | Perplexity Computer Chrome Extension
intel.summary: The core strategy presented emphasizes leveraging AI music generation and distribution tools, coupled with critical account setup and robust YouTube SEO, to fully capitalize on the burgeoning AI music market opportunity.
actionItems: Complete the initial setup by linking your DistroKid account with your bank/PayPal and connecting vidIQ to your YouTube, then officially claim your YouTube artist channel.
Implement continuous YouTube SEO for all AELOW and KURAO tracks using vidIQ, specifically optimizing titles, tags, and keywords to enhance discoverability.

intel.title: AIGuerrilla: The $68K AI Music Operation Nobody's Talking About & Skool Weekly Song Winner
intel.summary: The content details a lucrative AI music operation focused on generating significant income by leveraging AI tools for music creation and strategic YouTube SEO, distribution, and affiliate marketing to automate and scale production.
actionItems: Immediately set up and integrate all essential accounts: connect DistroKid to your bank or PayPal, link vidIQ to your YouTube channel, and claim your official artist YouTube channel.

Proactively research and implement the recommended AI music generation (Suno AI) and video marketing (vidIQ, Canva/CapCut) tools to optimize content creation and YouTube discoverability for AELOW and KURAO.
